objective: Evaluate whether think-tank should rely on specialist subagents when available.

role_results.claim: Specialist subagents should be preferred for high-stakes decisions.
evidence: Independent profile context reduces single-context anchoring.
risks: Higher runtime cost and orchestration complexity.
recommendations: Use specialist runtime when platform support is verified.
boundaries: Fixture proves schema shape, not platform parallelism.

role_results.claim: Do not overclaim specialist runtime without result recovery evidence.
evidence: Prior validation distinguished direct invocation from adapter runtime.
risks: False authority if fallback is mislabeled.
objections: A single model role-play is not independent expert execution.
boundaries: No live Claude Code Agent Team run in this fixture.
Fixture validates contract only; live platform runtime remains separately verified.
